overview: Integrative medicine clinic founded in 1985 offering treatment for chronic pain and illness through a combination of conventional and alternative medicine, including testosterone pellet therapy.
highlights: Testosterone pellet therapy administered every 5-6 months
Multidisciplinary team including physical therapists, acupuncturist, psychotherapist, and nutritionist
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone and patients with chronic pain and illness seeking integrative medical care.
